gap_analysis_summary: Bootstrap-tag translation-unit authenticity is fresh again through ninja/ctest after the Homebrew LLVM repair, but alpha remains untouched because kilo still fails closed on models/openai outbound connectivity, qwen still errors immediately, and gemini never produced a worker rendezvous
implemented_components: selfhost/bootstrap_tags.cpp - Integer tag constants that build
selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2 - Pure cpp2 scanner/combinator nucleus with atlas/manifold/chart/transition/join feature-stream coverage

selfhost_rbcursive_smoke - cppfront-boosted dogfood target and ctest case covering atlas/manifold, coords/local literals, chart contains/project/embed clauses, transition expressions, and join diagnostics

missing_components: Alpha transformation surface in selfhost bootstrap
MLIR SoN dialect compilation - blocked by LLVM 21 FieldParser issue
CAS internment implementation - no active selfhost path yet
Canonical types transpilation - canonical_types.cpp2 remains inventory only
Lowering passes - exist in old/ but not integrated
End-to-end pipeline - no working path from Cpp2 to SoN to C++
honest_note: The bootstrap-tag translation-unit edits in `src/selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2`, `tests/selfhost_rbcursive_smoke.cpp`, and `src/selfhost/CMakeLists.txt` are freshly authenticated again on this host: `/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm` now points at `../Cellar/llvm/22.1.1`, `ninja -C build selfhost_rbcursive_smoke` succeeds after regenerating the build tree, `ctest --test-dir build -R selfhost_rbcursive_smoke --output-on-failure` passes, and the direct `cppfront` + `clang++` fallback also passes through `/tmp/selfhost_rbcursive_smoke_manual`. The remaining blocker is delegated runtime connectivity only: a fresh `XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/kilo-data kilo run --print-logs --auto --format json --dir /Users/jim/work/cppfort -m openai/gpt-5.1-codex-mini ...` attempt now confirms the writable-db fix holds, but kilo still fails before worker output because it cannot refresh `models.dev` / `https://api.kilo.ai/api/openrouter/models` and then cannot reach `https://auth.openai.com/oauth/token` (`ConnectionRefused` / `FailedToOpenSocket`). `qwen -y ...` exits with `[API Error: Connection error.]`, and the user-directed `gemini -y -p ...` attempt produced no worker rendezvous before the user redirected back to qwen. Alpha remains the next untouched slice on `src/selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2` plus `tests/selfhost_rbcursive_smoke.cpp` until one delegated worker can actually execute.
